title: Signal
tagline: Start with a real Spotify song and follow the artist connections somewhere new
summary: Signal helps me get from one song I love to music worth playing next. Search the live Spotify catalog, follow releases and collaborators, or connect an invited account for deeper cuts from artists already in rotation.
outcome: The live product works with real Spotify songs, artwork, metadata, and listening links. Every pick explains its actual artist or release connection without inventing a similarity score.
role: Solo builder across the product, recommendation logic, and Spotify integration
proofPoints: Searches Spotify's real catalog without requiring a login
Explains the artist or release connection behind every pick
Offers a secure optional OAuth path for invited listeners
